ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java
Language: java
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for Java. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://docs.microsoft.com/java/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-java.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/intellij-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-community
Language: java
IntelliJ IDEA & IntelliJ Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RikkaApps/Shizuku-API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RikkaApps/Shizuku-API
Language: java
The API and the developer guide for Shizuku and Sui.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/nacos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/nacos
Language: java
an easy-to-use dynamic service discovery, configuration and service management platform for building AI cloud native applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anonfaded/FadCam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anonfaded/FadCam
Language: java
Open-source, ad-free Android multimedia recorder with background video recording, screen recording, live streaming, and remote camera control

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/beam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/beam
Language: java
Apache Beam is a unified programming model for Batch and Streaming data processing.

Language: java
🔥 Seata is an easy-to-use, high-performance, open source distributed transaction solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/rocketmq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/rocketmq
Language: java
Apache RocketMQ is a cloud native messaging and streaming platform, making it simple to build event-driven applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apolloconfig/apollo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apolloconfig/apollo
Language: java
Apollo is a reliable configuration management system suitable for microservice configuration management scenarios.
